ddls:
CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "distance_from_base_mm" REAL /* Distance from the base in millimeters */,
  "age_uncorrected_yr_BP" REAL /* Uncorrected age in years before present */,
  "age_corrected_yr_BP" REAL /* Corrected age in years before present */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the sample was collected */,
  "collector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who collected the sample */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was collected */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the sample collection location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the sample collection location */,
  "depth" REAL /* Depth at which the sample was collected (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES site_information ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_collector_id FOREIGN KEY ("collector_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "isotopic_ratios" (
  "ratio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each isotopic ratio entry */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sample the ratio belongs to */,
  "ratio_name" TEXT /* Name of the isotopic ratio (e.g., 230Th/238U) */,
  "ratio_value" REAL /* Value of the isotopic ratio */,
  "ratio_error" REAL /* Error associated with the isotopic ratio */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Method used for isotopic analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the isotopic ratio was measured */,
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the laboratory where the analysis was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ratio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_isotopic_ratios_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "concentration_data" (
  "concentration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each concentration entry */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sample the concentration belongs to */,
  "element" TEXT /* Name of the element (e.g., 238U, 232Th) */,
  "concentration_ng_per_g" REAL /* Concentration in ng/g */,
  "concentration_error" REAL /* Error associated with the concentration measurement */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Method used for concentration analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the concentration was measured */,
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the laboratory where the analysis was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("concentration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_concentration_data_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_logs" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error log entry */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sample the error is associated with */,
  "error_description" TEXT /* Description of the error encountered */,
  "error_date" TEXT /* Date when the error occurred */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who reported the error */,
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the laboratory where the error occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_logs_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sample */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the sample was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_information" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the site */,
  "description" TEXT /* Additional description of the site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the site */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the site */,
  "geological_context" TEXT /* Additional geological context of the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis entry */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample being analyzed */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., isotopic analysis) */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was conducted */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the laboratory where the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the analysis */,
  "quality_score" INTEGER /* Quality score of the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_analysis_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample the metadata belongs to */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the metadata field */,
  "field_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata field */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of metadata (e.g., text, date, number) */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of the metadata value (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the report entry */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample the report is associated with */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report content */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, Excel) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the report file (if stored as a file) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)
